group.andTooltip: Match assets that satisfy all of the following conditions (AND)
group.notTooltip: Match assets that do not match any of the following conditions (NOT)
group.orTooltip: Match assets that satisfy all of the following conditions (OR)
operators.haveDescriptionsDesc: All columns / fields have a description
prop.browsePathContainerDesc: A container in browse path of an asset.
prop.chartTotalViewCountDesc: The total view count for this chart. This requires chart usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.chartUniqueUserPercentileDesc: The relative view count percentile for this chart within the data platform instance in the past 30 days. This requires chart usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.chartUniqueUsersDesc: The total unique user count for this chart in the past 30 days. This requires chart usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.chartViewCountLast30DaysDesc: The total view count for this chart in the past 30 days. This requires chart usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.chartViewCountPercentileDesc: The relative view count percentile for this chart within the data platform instance in the past 30 days. This requires chart usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.columnsDesc: The set of columns / fields associated with the dataset.
prop.containerDesc: The parent container of the asset.
prop.dashboardTotalViewCountDesc: The total view count for this dashboard. This requires dashboard usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.dashboardUniqueUserPercentileDesc: The relative view count percentile for this dashboard within the data platform instance in the past 30 days. This requires dashboard usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.dashboardUniqueUsersDesc: The total unique user count for this dashboard in the past 30 days. This requires dashboard usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.dashboardViewCountLast30DaysDesc: The total view count for this dashboard in the past 30 days. This requires dashboard usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.dashboardViewCountPercentileDesc: The relative view count percentile for this dashboard within the data platform instance in the past 30 days. This requires dashboard usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.dataHubDescriptionDesc: The description as authored inside DataHub directly.
prop.datasetUniqueUserPercentileDesc: The relative unique user count percentile for this dataset within the data platform instance. This requires usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.datasetUniqueUsersDesc: The total unique user count for this dataset in the past 30 days. This requires usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.deprecatedDesc: Whether the asset is deprecated or not.
prop.domainDesc: The domain that the asset is a part of.
prop.firstSynchronizedDesc: The time at which the asset was first ingested into DataHub (ms).
prop.glossaryTermGroupsDesc: The set of parent Term Groups for Glossary Terms attached to the asset.
prop.glossaryTermsAppliedDesc: The glossary terms applied to an asset
prop.glossaryTermsDesc: The glossary terms attached to the asset.
prop.lastObservedDesc: The time at which the asset was last observed by DataHub (ms).
prop.lastSynchronizedDesc: The time at which the asset was last ingested into DataHub (ms).
prop.nativePlatformDescriptionDesc: The description as authored and ingested from an external Data Platform.
prop.numColumnsDesc: The number of columns / fields associated with the dataset.
prop.ownershipTypeDesc: Match entities that have a custom ownership type
prop.platformDesc: The data platform where the asset lives.
prop.queryCountLast30DaysDesc: The total query count in the past 30 days. This requires usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.queryCountPercentile: Query Count Percentile in Last 30 Days (0-100)
prop.queryCountPercentileDesc: The relative query count percentile for this dataset inside the data platform instance. This requires usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.rowCountDesc: The total number of rows in the dataset. This requires data profiling to be enabled for connected data sources.
prop.rowCountPercentileDesc: The relative row count percentile for this dataset within the data platform instance. This requires data profiling to be enabled.
prop.sizeInBytesDesc: The total size of the dataset in bytes. This requires data profiling to be enabled for supported data sources.
prop.sizeInBytesPercentileDesc: The relative storage size percentile for this dataset within the data platform instance. This requires data profiling to be enabled for supported sources.
prop.structuredPropertyDesc: Match entities that have a custom structured property
prop.tagsAppliedDesc: The tags applied to an asset
prop.tagsDesc: The tags attached to the asset.
prop.uniqueUserPercentile: Unique User Percentile in the Last 30 Days (0-100)
prop.uniqueUsersLast30Days: Unique Users in the Last 30 Days
prop.updateCountLast30DaysDesc: The total write count for this dataset in the past 30 days. This requires usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.updateCountPercentile: Update Count Percentile in Last 30 Days (0-100)
prop.updateCountPercentileDesc: The relative write count percentile for this dataset within the data platform instance. This requires usage data ingestion to be enabled.
prop.urnDesc: The raw urn identifier of the asset.
prop.viewCountPercentile: View Count Percentile in Last 30 Days (0-100)
